name: Reflex Plus Dog Dry Food – Chicken Hypoallergenic for Medium & Large Breeds 12kg
shortDescription: Give your dog complete, balanced nutrition with this super-premium chicken recipe specially formulated for medium and large breed adult dogs aged 18–24 months up to 7 years. Made with high-quality animal proteins, this nutrient-rich formula supports strong muscles, healthy digestion, immune system function, and overall vitality.
description: With 81% of its total protein derived from premium animal ingredients, this highly digestible recipe provides the essential nutrients active adult dogs need to thrive. Enriched with XOS prebiotics, L-Carnitine, flaxseed, brewer’s yeast, and Yucca schidigera, it promotes optimal digestive health, efficient energy metabolism, healthy skin and coat, and reduced stool odor. Key Benefits . High-quality chicken protein supports lean muscle maintenance and overall body condition. . XOS Prebiotics help maintain a healthy digestive system and support natural immune defenses. .L-Carnitine assists in fat metabolism and energy production, helping dogs maintain an ideal body condition. . Flaxseed provides a natural source of Omega-3 fatty acids to support healthy skin and a shiny coat. . Brewer’s Yeast is rich in B vitamins and highly digestible proteins that promote digestive health and overall wellbeing. . Yucca Schidigera helps reduce stool odor by naturally binding ammonia in the digestive tract. . Whey Powder enhances palatability while supplying high-quality protein for daily nutrition. . Enriched with essential vitamins and minerals to support strong bones, immunity, vision, and long-term health. Nutritional Analysis Crude Protein: 25% Crude Fat: 14% Crude Ash: 7% Crude Fibre: 2.5% Added Vitamins & Nutrients Vitamin A: 18,000 IU/kg Vitamin D3: 1,500 IU/kg Vitamin E: 200 mg/kg Vitamin C: 200 mg/kg Ingredients Processed Chicken Protein (30%), Wheat, Corn, Chicken Fat, Hydrolysed Animal Protein, Rice, Sugar Beet Pulp, Liver Flavouring, Whey Powder, Vitamins and Minerals, Xylo-Oligosaccharides (XOS), Brewer’s Yeast, L-Carnitine, Flaxseed, Salt, Yucca Schidigera, Preservatives and Antioxidants. Support your dog’s health every day with a delicious chicken recipe designed to deliver complete nutrition, optimal digestion, and lasting vitality for medium and large breed adult dogs.
